chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-485 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 Ms. Rehana Siddiqui, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Assistant Attorney General ----- Learned Counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press instant Petition as the grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed. In view of above, instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
